canonical_definition: The ability of a model to comprehend and reason about specific, detailed events and their temporal relationships within a video, as opposed to just understanding the overall gist.
papers: Artemis:  Towards Referential Understanding in Complex Videos
SlowFocus: Enhancing Fine-grained Temporal Understanding in Video LLM

definitions.text: The ability to understand detailed, target-specific visual content in videos with sufficient granularity to describe actions and changes over time.
